name: Apple Pancakes II
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the butter, milk, and egg. Stir in the vanilla.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
4. Add the applesauce and mix well.
5. Heat a griddle or frying pan over medium heat and grease with butter.
6. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the hot griddle for each pancake.
7. Cook until edges are lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
8. Flip the pancakes and cook on the second side until golden brown.
9. Serve hot with maple syrup or apple jelly and plenty of butter.
